subcodes.first_line: O thou stirring friend! Praise be to God, thou art brimming with the wine of the love of God, and thy senses are perfumed with the fragrances of the Abhá Paradise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار شورانگیز الحمد لله از باده محبت الله جام لبریزی و مشام بنفحات جنت ابهی
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @praise and encouragement, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
